payload.subject: AP auto-publish threshold proposal + AP_PUBLISH_TOKEN delivery

threshold_proposal.tier_2_moderate: HRCB >= 0.6 AND HN >= 200 AND consensus >= 0.3 — top 8%, add ~2-5/week
threshold_proposal.tier_3_review_queue: HRCB >= 0.5 AND HN >= 100 — 11%, queue for review
threshold_proposal.recommendation: Start with Tier 1 only. Expand to Tier 2 after one week of monitoring.

payload.token_delivery: Human director will set AP_PUBLISH_TOKEN in your Worker env. Confirm preferred delivery method.
payload.site_review_exchange: Accepting — ready to open when convenient.
